summary: A powerful performance of "Standing on the Moon" with emotive Jerry guitar work; recording quality not detailed
review: The reviewer raves about Jerry's rendition of "Standing on the Moon," calling it the best he’s ever heard and noting its emotional impact. No information is provided about the source or technical fidelity of the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review highlights a standout song; no data on recording quality, so rating leans heavily on show performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity or mix; assumed adequate based on overall positive sentiment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as delivering his best, most emotional performance of "Standing on the Moon"
